info.title: Fiix CMMS API Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: The Fiix CMMS API is oriented around CMMS instance data and functionality, with documented examples for assets, asset locations and categories, work orders, work-order tasks, and file attachments used in maintenance operations.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Fiix CMMS API. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Fiix describes its API as access to CMMS instance-specific data and functionality, and the public guide walks through listing assets, retrieving individual assets with location and category relationships, creating and updating assets, creating work orders, associating assets to work orders, creating work-order tasks, and uploading files tied to Asset and WorkOrder objects. That makes the confirmed public surface useful for asset synchronization and maintenance writeback rather than telemetry ingestion. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
